title: Wealthy AI workers send San Francisco house prices soaring
summary: San Francisco's median home price has reached a record $1.7 million as wealthy AI industry workers drive up demand in the competitive market. The surge reflects the concentration of high-income tech talent, particularly in artificial intelligence. The record prices are fundamentally reshaping the Bay Area's real estate landscape.
content: The median cost of a home in the city is now $1.7m, a record high, according to the latest figures.

zh.title: 富有的人工智能行业工作者推高旧金山房价飙升
zh.summary: 随着富有的人工智能行业工作者推高竞争激烈的市场需求,旧金山的中位房价达到创纪录的170万美元。这次激增反映了高收入科技人才的集中,特别是在人工智能领域。这些创纪录的价格正在从根本上改变湾区的房地产格局。

title: I run the UK's biggest bank, here are five ways to manage your money
summary: The CEO of Lloyds Bank, the UK's largest bank, shares five strategies for managing personal finances effectively. The guidance covers saving, budgeting, avoiding scams, and managing money within relationships. The advice draws on leadership perspective from one of Britain's most significant financial institutions.
content: The CEO of Lloyds Bank talks about how to save, budget, avoid scams and manage money in a relationship.

zh.title: 我管理英国最大的银行，以下是我个人理财的五种方法
zh.summary: 英国最大银行劳埃德银行的首席执行官分享了五种有效管理个人财务的策略。该指导涵盖储蓄、预算编制、避免诈骗和在关系中管理资金。这些建议来自英国最重要的金融机构之一的领导层视角。

title: Why electric cars cost more to insure - and what's being done about it
summary: Insurance costs for electric vehicles remain significantly higher than traditional cars, creating a barrier for potential buyers. Expensive repairs and limited service availability are among the key factors driving elevated premiums. Industry participants and policymakers are actively working to make EV insurance more affordable.
content: The insurance cost of electric vehicles is still putting many would-be buyers. So what can be done about it?

zh.title: 电动汽车为什么保险费更贵——以及正在采取什么措施
zh.summary: 电动汽车的保险费用仍然远高于传统汽车，这对潜在买家形成了障碍。昂贵的维修费用和服务可用性不足是推高保费的关键因素。业界参与者和政策制定者正在积极努力使电动汽车保险更加负担得起。

title: Jim Cramer sees a big risk to the bull market resurfacing — and it's not the Iran war
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer has identified the next major threat to the bull market: a surge in stock offerings and debt issuance. While geopolitical tensions like the Iran conflict dominate headlines, Cramer warns that capital market activity poses greater risk to valuations. The influx of new securities could pressure stock prices across the market.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance is the next big threat to the bull market.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默看到牛市面临的重大风险再次浮现——这不是伊朗战争
zh.summary: 美国全国广播公司财经频道的吉姆·克莱默已经确认了对牛市的下一个重大威胁：股票发行和债务发行的激增。虽然伊朗冲突等地缘政治紧张局势主导了新闻头条，但克莱默警告说资本市场活动对估值构成更大风险。新证券的涌入可能会给整个市场的股价带来压力。

title: Trump's European allies add distance on Iran following testy NATO summit
summary: Trump's European allies are distancing themselves from his Iran policy following a contentious NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey. The tense meetings revealed disagreements among NATO members on how to approach escalating Iran tensions. The divisions highlight deepening splits within the alliance over foreign policy strategy.
content: President Donald Trump spent two days in Ankara, Turkey with other NATO member leaders.

zh.title: 在紧张的北约峰会后，特朗普的欧洲盟国与伊朗政策保持距离
zh.summary: 在土耳其安卡拉举行的充满争议的北约峰会后，特朗普的欧洲盟国正在与他的伊朗政策保持距离。紧张的会议表明北约成员国对如何应对伊朗局势升级存在分歧。这些分歧突显了联盟在外交政策战略上日益加深的分裂。

title: Trump announces long-shot bid to get Supreme Court to rehear birthright citizenship case
summary: Trump is pursuing a long-shot effort to convince the Supreme Court to reconsider a case involving birthright citizenship. This request follows his earlier petition asking the Court to rehear his case regarding the E. Jean Carroll sexual abuse and defamation verdict. Both represent ambitious attempts to overturn previous unfavorable court decisions.
content: Trump already asked the Supreme Court to reconsider denying him an appeal of a verdict holding him liable for sexually abusing and defaming E. Jean Carroll.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布努力说服最高法院重新审理出生地公民权案件
zh.summary: 特朗普正在进行一项努力，试图说服最高法院重新考虑涉及出生地公民权的案件。这一请求是在他之前请求法院重新审理涉及E·简·卡罗尔性虐待和诽谤裁决的案件之后提出的。两者都代表了推翻以前不利法院裁决的雄心勃勃的尝试。

title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
summary: Investor Michael Burry has taken positions in sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter while predicting that regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets. Burry believes regulatory restrictions on prediction markets will strengthen traditional sportsbooks. His dual strategy reflects confidence in regulated operators while betting against unregulated competitors.
content: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.

zh.title: 迈克尔·伯里押注体育博彩公司DraftKings和Flutter，预测预测市场将受到监管限制
zh.summary: 投资者迈克尔·伯里在体育博彩公司DraftKings和Flutter中持有头寸，同时预测监管机构最终将打击预测市场。伯里相信对预测市场的监管限制将加强传统体育博彩公司。他的双重策略反映了对受监管运营商的信心，同时押注对抗不受监管的竞争对手。

title: Did you mess up on your taxes? The IRS just made it easier to avoid paying a penalty.
summary: The IRS has simplified procedures for taxpayers to avoid penalties for tax filing errors, representing a significant taxpayer-friendly policy shift. The change eases burden for those seeking to correct mistakes without additional financial consequences.
content: It’s a ‘major taxpayer win,’ according to one advocate inside the IRS

zh.title: 你的税务出错了吗？美国国税局刚刚让避免罚款变得更容易
zh.summary: 美国国税局简化了纳税人避免税务申报错误罚款的程序，代表了一个重要的有利于纳税人的政策转变。这一变化减轻了那些寻求纠正错误且不承担额外财务后果的人的负担。

title: Levi Strauss beats quarterly expectations, raises guidance and dividend
summary: Levi Strauss exceeded quarterly expectations and raised its full-year guidance and dividend payout. The strong performance demonstrates continued momentum in the apparel company's fiscal 2026 results.
content: Levi Strauss beat quarterly expectations on the top and bottom lines during its fiscal 2026 second quarter.

zh.title: Levi Strauss超越季度预期，提高指导和股息
zh.summary: Levi Strauss超过了季度预期，并提高了全年指导和股息支付。这一强劲表现证明了这家服装公司在2026财年业绩中的持续动力。

title: SpaceX stock closes below debut price at $148 in two-day slide after Nasdaq-100 inclusion
summary: SpaceX's stock price fell below its $150 debut price, declining for a second consecutive day following its addition to the Nasdaq-100 index. The $85.7 billion IPO remains record-breaking despite the near-term price weakness.
content: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.

zh.title: SpaceX股票在纳入纳斯达克-100指数后两日下滑，收于148美元，低于150美元的首次亮相价格
zh.summary: SpaceX股票价格跌破其150美元的首次亮相价格，在被纳入纳斯达克-100指数后连续第二天下跌。尽管近期股价疲软，这次85.7亿美元的IPO仍然创纪录。

title: Investors haven’t been this bullish on the dollar in a decade. How the buck can keep climbing.
summary: Investor bullish positioning on the U.S. dollar has reached decade-high levels, with potential gains dependent on sustained oil price increases and Middle East geopolitical tensions. The strength reflects expectations that the Federal Reserve may maintain higher interest rates.
content: A crowded bet on a stronger U.S. dollar may depend on whether Wednesday’s jump in oil prices proves lasting, as renewed Middle East tensions revive inflation concerns and bolster expectations that the Federal Reserve may need to keep policy tight.

zh.title: 投资者对美元的看涨情绪创十年新高。美元如何继续攀升。
zh.summary: 投资者对美元的看涨头寸已达到十年高位，潜在收益取决于石油价格持续上升和中东地缘政治紧张局势。这种强势反映了美联储可能维持较高利率的预期。

title: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border
summary: Meta is constructing its first major Canadian data center as part of its broader artificial intelligence infrastructure expansion. The investment signals Meta's commitment to scaling AI compute capacity across North America.
content: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border.

zh.title: 随着人工智能扩张跨越边境，Meta在加拿大建造首个大型数据中心
zh.summary: Meta正在建造其首个主要的加拿大数据中心，作为其更广泛的人工智能基础设施扩张的一部分。该投资表明了Meta对在整个北美范围内扩展AI计算能力的承诺。

title: Online marketplaces still selling dozens of unsafe baby products, Which? finds
summary: Which? found that online marketplaces including Amazon and TikTok continue selling baby products subject to safety notices, including pillows, sleeping bags, and feeders. The findings highlight persistent compliance gaps despite regulatory efforts to remove unsafe items. This raises concerns about consumer protection on major e-commerce platforms.
content: Pillows, sleeping bags and feeders subject to safety notices were found on sites including Amazon and TikTok.

zh.title: 在线市场仍在销售数十种不安全的婴儿产品，Which?发现
zh.summary: Which?发现包括亚马逊和TikTok在内的在线市场继续销售受安全通知约束的婴儿产品，包括枕头、睡袋和喂食器。这些发现突显了尽管有监管部门努力删除不安全物品，但仍存在持久的合规漏洞。这引发了对主要电子商务平台消费者保护的担忧。

title: Trump says he's 'not sure' he wants Iran deal as Hormuz Strait strife deepens
summary: Trump expressed uncertainty about wanting an Iran deal while tensions escalate in the Hormuz Strait, following military strikes on Iranian infrastructure by Centcom. The president signaled potential additional military action, escalating regional tensions. The comments underscore ongoing US-Iran geopolitical tensions and military posturing.
content: Centcom said it launched dozens of strikes on Iranian military infrastructure and small boats; Trump said the U.S. might take more military action "tonight."

zh.title: 特朗普表示他"不确定"是否想要伊朗协议，荷尔木兹海峡冲突加剧
zh.summary: 特朗普对伊朗协议表示不确定，同时荷尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级，美国中央司令部对伊朗基础设施进行军事打击。总统暗示可能进行额外的军事行动，升级地区紧张局势。这些言论强调了持续的美伊地缘政治紧张和军事对峙。

title: More than two-thirds of tech stocks are at least 20% off recent highs. What’s happening to the AI trade?
summary: Over two-thirds of tech stocks have declined at least 20% from recent peaks as investors take profits following strong earnings in the second quarter. The pullback affects major semiconductor companies and signals potential cooling in the AI investment boom. This profit-taking reflects broader market volatility and uncertainty about AI's sustained growth trajectory.
content: Major semiconductor names have been falling hard as investors take profits following a blockbuster second quarter.

zh.title: 超过三分之二的科技股下跌至少20%。AI交易发生了什么？
zh.summary: 超过三分之二的科技股从近期高点下跌至少20%，因为投资者在第二季度强劲收益后获利了结。这次回调影响了主要半导体公司，并预示AI投资热潮可能降温。这种获利了结反映了更广泛的市场波动和对AI持续增长轨迹的不确定性。

title: Private student loans with rewards: These lenders offer cash back and discounts
summary: Private student loan lenders are offering incentives including cash back and discounts to borrowers who meet specific conditions like graduating on time or maintaining good grades. These reward programs aim to attract borrowers in a competitive lending market. The offerings represent an evolving approach to student lending amid broader education financing challenges.
content: Find out where student loan borrowers can earn cash back for getting good grades, graduating, paying on time and more.

zh.title: 有奖励的私人学生贷款：这些贷方提供现金返还和折扣
zh.summary: 私人学生贷款机构向符合特定条件（如按时毕业或保持良好成绩）的借款人提供现金返还和折扣等激励。这些奖励计划旨在在竞争激烈的贷款市场中吸引借款人，代表了在教育融资挑战背景下学生贷款方式的演变。

title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
summary: Federal Reserve minutes from its June 16-17 meeting reveal officials were divided on the direction of future interest rate policy. The split reflects ongoing uncertainty about economic conditions and inflation trajectory. The disclosure provides insight into the central bank's deliberations ahead of future policy decisions.
content: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.

zh.title: 美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向意见不一，会议纪要显示
zh.summary: 美联储6月16-17日会议纪要显示，官员们对未来利率政策方向意见不一。这种分歧反映了对经济状况和通胀走向的持续不确定性，为中央银行未来政策决策前的审议过程提供了洞察。

title: Trump loses latest appeals court bid to restore his name to Kennedy Center
summary: An appeals court ruled against Trump's effort to restore his name to the Kennedy Center, finding he failed to provide evidence that the arts venue's fundraising would suffer from its removal. The decision represents another legal setback in Trump's dispute with the Kennedy Center. The ruling upholds the organization's right to manage its namesake and naming decisions.
content: The appeals court said Trump had failed to provide any evidence that the Kennedy Center's fundraising would be harmed if his name is not attached.

zh.title: 特朗普最新上诉败诉，无法恢复肯尼迪中心的名字
zh.summary: 上诉法院裁定反对特朗普恢复肯尼迪中心名字的诉求，认为他未能提供证据证明移除其名字会对该艺术场所的筹款造成损害。该判决代表了特朗普与肯尼迪中心争端中的又一次法律挫折，维护了该组织管理其名称和命名决定的权利。

title: Where this top bond manager is investing for income in the second half
summary: Franklin Templeton's Fixed Income chief investment officer Sonal Desai is identifying income opportunities as the bond landscape shifts in the second half of the year. The manager sees strategic opportunities emerging from evolving market conditions. The outlook reflects changing investment dynamics in fixed income markets.
content: As the bond landscape shifts, Franklin Templeton Fixed Income chief investment officer Sonal Desai is finding ample opportunities for income.

zh.title: 这位顶级债券基金经理在下半年如何投资以获取收入
zh.summary: 富兰克林邓普顿固定收益首席投资官Sonal Desai在债券市场格局于下半年转变之际寻找收入机会。该基金经理看到从不断变化的市场条件中出现的战略机会。前景反映了固定收益市场中不断变化的投资动态。

title: ‘I’ve plenty of time on my hands’: Advisers bombard me with offers of free steak dinners. Is it wrong to go for the food?
summary: The column discusses whether it's appropriate for investors to accept free meal offers from financial advisers who use dining events as client recruitment tactics. The practice raises questions about whether accepting meals creates implicit obligations or conflicts of interest. The piece explores the ethics of advisor-client entertainment in financial services.
content: “I get hungry for a meal at a good restaurant.”

zh.title: "我有的是时间"：顾问们向我轰炸免费牛排晚餐邀请。为了食物而接受是错误的吗？
zh.summary: 该专栏讨论投资者接受财务顾问免费餐饮邀请是否恰当，这些顾问将餐饮活动作为客户招募策略。这种做法引发了关于接受餐饮是否会产生隐含义务或利益冲突的问题。这篇文章探讨了金融服务中顾问与客户娱乐的伦理问题。

title: Jeff Bezos’s space company may be seeking a valuation more than twice as big as Rocket Lab’s
summary: Blue Origin is reportedly targeting a $130 billion private-market valuation in fundraising, significantly higher than Rocket Lab's value but a fraction of SpaceX's nearly $2 trillion valuation. The ambitious valuation reflects investor appetite for space industry companies despite competitive pressures. The figure underscores Blue Origin's positioning within the increasingly crowded commercial spaceflight sector.
content: Blue Origin is reportedly targeting a $130 billion private-market valuation, which would be just a fraction of SpaceX’s nearly $2 trillion market capitalization.

zh.title: 杰夫·贝索斯的太空公司可能寻求的估值是火箭实验室的两倍多
zh.summary: 据报道，蓝色起源公司在融资中目标估值为1300亿美元，明显高于火箭实验室的估值，但仅为SpaceX近2万亿美元估值的一小部分。这一雄心勃勃的估值反映了投资者尽管面临竞争压力但对太空产业公司的兴趣。这一数字强调了蓝色起源在日益拥挤的商业航天领域中的位置。

title: With Micron’s stock well off its peak, investors want proof that the AI boom can last
summary: Micron's declining stock price has prompted investors to seek evidence that the AI-driven demand for memory chips can sustain elevated pricing over time. The scrutiny reflects concerns about whether the AI boom's benefits to semiconductor makers are durable or cyclical. Investors are questioning the longevity of elevated semiconductor valuations amid the broader tech selloff.
content: Investors in memory stocks are looking for signs that elevated pricing can be sustained for years without demand suffering.

zh.title: 美光股价远低于峰值，投资者要求证明AI热潮能持续
zh.summary: 美光股价下跌促使投资者寻求证据，证明AI驱动的存储芯片需求能够维持高价格。这种关注反映了人们对AI热潮给半导体制造商带来的好处是否持久或周期性的担忧。投资者在更广泛的科技抛售中质疑半导体估值的可持续性。

title: Trump floats idea of Australia’s retirement system again. But what about Social Security?
summary: Trump's administration is reportedly exploring a retirement system modeled on Australia's approach, following the recent launch of "Trump accounts" for children. The proposal raises questions about how such a system would coexist with Social Security. The initiative reflects the administration's interest in alternative retirement frameworks amid broader social policy discussions.
content: The president said his administration was working on a plan based on the Austrialian system, days after the launch of “Trump accounts” for children.

zh.title: 特朗普再次提出澳大利亚退休制度的想法。但社会保障怎么办？
zh.summary: 特朗普政府据报道正在探索以澳大利亚方式为蓝本的退休制度，继"特朗普账户"为儿童推出之后。该提案引发了关于这样的制度如何与社会保障并存的问题。该倡议反映了该政府在更广泛的社会政策讨论中对替代退休框架的兴趣。

title: Dow tumbles 500 points as oil jumps with Trump saying attacks on Iran to continue: Live updates
summary: Markets declined sharply with the Dow falling over 500 points as oil prices surged following Trump's announcement at a NATO summit in Turkey that ceasefire talks with Iran have ended. The statement signals continued military escalation in US-Iran tensions. The market reaction reflects investor concerns about geopolitical risk and energy price volatility.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump told the NATO summit in Turkey that the ceasefire with Iran is "over."

zh.title: 道琼斯指数下跌500点，油价上涨，特朗普表示对伊朗的攻击将继续：实时更新
zh.summary: 市场急剧下跌，道琼斯指数下跌超过500点，油价飙升。特朗普在土耳其北约峰会上宣布与伊朗的停火谈判已结束。该声明表明美伊紧张局势将继续升级。市场反应反映了投资者对地缘政治风险和能源价格波动的担忧。

title: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push
summary: Apple announced a $30 billion-plus commitment to expand its partnership with Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking, marking the company's largest American manufacturing investment. The deal underscores Apple's strategy to strengthen domestic semiconductor supply chains. The investment reflects broader industry trends toward onshoring critical manufacturing capabilities.
content: Apple is expanding its Broadcom partnership in a $30 billion-plus chipmaking agreement, its largest American manufacturing commitment to date.

zh.title: 苹果承诺投入300亿美元与Broadcom扩展美国芯片制造业务
zh.summary: 苹果宣布投入超过300亿美元的承诺，以扩展与Broadcom的合作伙伴关系，专注于美国芯片制造，这是苹果在美国制造业最大的投资。该交易强调了苹果加强国内半导体供应链的战略。该投资反映了更广泛的行业趋势，即向关键制造能力的本地化转变。

title: Few bright spots in Wednesday's tough market — why Nvidia stock is one of them
summary: Nvidia stock emerged as a bright spot during a difficult market day that saw most stocks decline, according to the Investing Club's daily market analysis. The resilience highlights ongoing investor confidence in key AI-related companies despite broader market weakness. The performance contrasts with the broader sector selloff affecting many tech and semiconductor stocks.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 周三艰难市场中鲜有亮点——英伟达股票为何是其中之一
zh.summary: 根据投资俱乐部的日常市场分析，英伟达股票在大多数股票下跌的困难交易日中成为一个亮点。这种韧性突出了投资者对关键人工智能相关公司持续的信心，尽管市场整体表现较弱。该表现与影响许多科技和半导体股票的更广泛的板块抛售形成对比。

title: A ‘few’ Fed officials said there was a case for a rate hike in June, minutes from Warsh’s first meeting show
summary: Federal Reserve minutes from the June meeting reveal that a minority of officials believed there was justification for raising interest rates in June. The dissenting view on potential rate hikes reflects diverse perspectives within the Fed on appropriate monetary policy. The disclosure shows ongoing debate about the pace and direction of interest rate adjustments.
content: A “few” Federal Reserve officials said there was a case for raising interest rates in June, according to minutes released Wednesday from the central bank’s meeting last month.

zh.title: 美联储会议纪要显示"少数"官员称6月份存在加息的理由
zh.summary: 联邦储备委员会6月会议纪要显示，少数官员认为6月份有理由提高利率。对潜在加息的异议反映了美联储内部对适当货币政策的不同观点。这份披露表明了关于利率调整步伐和方向的持续辩论。

title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
summary: Oil market speculators predict Strait of Hormuz traffic won't normalize until 2027, with only 44% probability of return to normal flows by December 1st. The disruption matters because the Strait is a critical chokepoint for global oil supply.
content: Speculators now see just a 44% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.

zh.title: Kalshi交易员预测：霍尔木兹海峡在经历最新挫折后要到2027年才能恢复正常交通
zh.summary: 油市投机者预测霍尔木兹海峡交通要到2027年才能恢复正常，到12月1日前流量恢复的概率仅为44%。这很重要，因为该海峡是全球石油供应的关键枢纽。

title: Waymo starts driverless rides in four more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
summary: Waymo is expanding its robotaxi service to four additional U.S. cities, cementing its lead in the emerging autonomous vehicle market. The expansion demonstrates growing commercial viability of driverless technology.
content: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

zh.title: 随着扩展加速，Waymo在四个美国市场启动无人驾驶服务
zh.summary: Waymo正在将其自动驾驶出租车服务扩展到四个美国城市，巩固其在新兴自动驾驶汽车市场中的领先地位。这一扩展表明无人驾驶技术的商业可行性不断增长。

title: The American Dream is missing one key ingredient, says Harvard happiness expert: Without it, 'life is pretty grim'
summary: Only 35% of Americans define the American Dream as community belonging, yet research shows thriving requires strong social connections. The gap highlights a disconnect between how people envision success and what experts say is necessary for wellbeing.
content: Only 35% of U.S. adults define the American Dream as being part of a community. But one cannot thrive without the people around them, say experts.

zh.title: 哈佛幸福专家表示：美国梦缺少一个关键成分，没有它，'生活相当严峻'
zh.summary: 只有35%的美国人将美国梦定义为社区归属感，但研究表明繁荣需要强大的社会联系。这一差距凸显了人们对成功的理解与专家认为幸福所需之间的脱节。

title: ‘I’ll happily wait’: Does delaying Social Security make sense for high earners like me?
summary: High earners weigh whether delaying Social Security optimizes lifetime benefits, noting that benefits are tax-exempt in many states. Strategic timing of claiming can significantly improve financial outcomes for certain demographics.
content: “In many states, Social Security benefits are exempt from state income tax.”

zh.title: "我很乐意等待"：延迟领取社会保障对像我这样的高收入者是否值得?
zh.summary: 高收入者权衡延迟领取社会保障是否能优化终身福利，注意到在许多州这些福利是免税的。战略性地选择领取时间可以显著改善某些人口群体的财务状况。

title: I started retirement with $3 million. Now I’m 89 and down to $2 million. What if I get sick?
summary: A retiree with $2 million at age 89 faces potential financial strain from long-term care needs despite adequate assets for normal living expenses. The case underscores the severe financial risk healthcare costs pose even to relatively wealthy retirees.
content: Even if you’re not worried about your normal spending anymore, a long-term-care need is still a problem for any budget.

zh.title: 我退休时有300万美元。现在我89岁，只剩200万美元。如果我生病了怎么办?
zh.summary: 一位89岁拥有200万美元的退休人士面临长期护理需求可能带来的财务压力，尽管其资产足以支付正常生活开支。这个案例强调了医疗保健成本对相对富裕的退休人士构成的严重财务风险。

title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'over,' U.S. will 'hit them hard tonight'
summary: President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire over and threatened immediate military action following Middle East escalations. The statement signals a major shift in U.S.-Iran policy with potential geopolitical consequences.
content: The president was asked about the ceasefire after an escalation of fighting in the Middle East.

zh.title: 特朗普表示伊朗停火"结束"，美国今晚将"重击"他们
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布伊朗停火结束，并在中东局势升级后威胁立即采取军事行动。该声明表明美国-伊朗政策的重大转变，可能产生地缘政治后果。

title: Kentucky Gov. Beshear presses McConnell to provide health update as speculation grows
summary: Kentucky's governor is pressing McConnell, the former Senate Republican leader hospitalized on June 14, to publicly disclose his health status amid widespread speculation. McConnell's condition remains unclear after he declined to seek reelection.
content: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.

zh.title: 肯塔基州州长贝希尔敦促麦康奈尔公开健康状况，猜测声浪不断
zh.summary: 肯塔基州州长敦促前参议院共和党领导人麦康奈尔（于6月14日住院）在广泛猜测中公开披露其健康状况。麦康奈尔放弃寻求连任后，其健康状况仍不明确。

title: As a red-hot global stock market stumbles into bear territory, this Wall Street bull spots a dip worth buying
summary: Wall Street analyst Tom Lee sees global stocks declining into bear territory as a buying opportunity, remaining bullish despite recent losses. His conviction reflects confidence in underlying market fundamentals.
content: Tom Lee of Fundstrat says he’s buying the dip, and not scared off by Samsung’s losses

zh.title: 全球股市从火热跌入熊市，华尔街看多者发现值得买入的机会
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师汤姆·李将全球股票下跌进入熊市视为买入机会，尽管近期出现亏损仍保持看涨。他的信念反映了对市场基本面的信心。

title: Why the drop in stocks and oil market reaction is not worse after Trump's comments
summary: Markets are absorbing Trump's Iran-related comments with modest declines in stocks and oil, suggesting traders see limited escalation risk. The muted reaction indicates confidence the conflict will remain contained.
content: All things considered, markets are taking the latest escalation in Middle East in stride.

zh.title: 特朗普言论后股票和油价下跌反应为何没有更糟
zh.summary: 市场平稳消化了特朗普关于伊朗的言论，股票和石油出现温和下跌，表明交易员认为升级风险有限。反应平缓表明市场对冲突将保持受控充满信心。

title: Healthy Returns: Employers aren't expanding coverage of GLP-1 obesity drugs – many are finding ways around it
summary: Only 36% of employers cover GLP-1 drugs for both diabetes and weight loss, unchanged from 2025 despite rising demand. Many companies are avoiding expanded coverage as obesity medication costs surge.
content: Around 36% of employers said they provide coverage of GLP-1s for both diabetes and weight loss, the same as 2025 and up from 34% in 2024, the survey said.

zh.title: 健康回报：雇主不扩展GLP-1减肥药物的覆盖范围——许多公司正在寻找规避方式
zh.summary: 仅36%的雇主为糖尿病和减肥提供GLP-1药物覆盖，与2025年相比没有变化，尽管需求上升。许多公司随着肥胖症药物成本激增而避免扩大覆盖范围。

title: Oil prices surge after Trump suggests U.S.-Iran cease-fire is over
summary: Crude oil prices jumped after Trump stated that dealing with Iran is "a waste of time," signaling trader concern about conflict escalation. Higher energy prices could amplify inflation pressures and slow economic growth.
content: Brent crude and West Texas Intermediate contracts climbed on President Donald Trump saying dealing with Tehran is “a waste of time”

zh.title: 特朗普暗示美伊停火结束后油价飙升
zh.summary: 特朗普表示与伊朗打交道是"浪费时间"后，原油价格跳升，表明交易员担心冲突升级。更高的能源价格可能会加剧通胀压力并放缓经济增长。

title: Bezos' Blue Origin valued at $130 billion in first public fundraising round
summary: Blue Origin raised outside capital in its first public funding round at a $130 billion valuation, establishing itself as a major space industry player. The round validates Bezos' commercial space ambitions and signals investor confidence.
content: Bezos' Blue Origin is raising outside capital in a round valuing the rocket company at $130 billion, sources told CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin.

zh.title: 贝索斯蓝色起源公司首次公开融资估值达130亿美元
zh.summary: 蓝色起源在首次公开融资中以130亿美元估值筹集外部资本，确立了自己作为太空产业主要参与者的地位。此融资轮验证了贝索斯的商业太空雄心，并表明投资者信心。

title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
summary: Trump criticized Spain for insufficient NATO contributions and threatened to cut off trade, escalating tensions with the ally at NATO's summit in Turkey. The ultimatum reflects Trump's ongoing pressure on members for increased defense spending.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

zh.title: 特朗普说他不想与西班牙有任何关系:'切断所有贸易'
zh.summary: 特朗普因西班牙的北约贡献不足而批评该国，并威胁切断贸易，在土耳其北约峰会上加剧了与盟国的紧张关系。这一最后通牒反映了特朗普对成员国增加国防支出的持续压力。

title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
summary: Federal Reserve meeting minutes are expected to reveal disagreement among policymakers over interest rate policy, a rare occurrence in recent decades. The internal debate could complicate future monetary policy decisions.
content: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

zh.title: 美联储会议记录将显示关于利率的'家庭争执'。这场争执可能会持续一段时间
zh.summary: 美联储会议记录预计将揭示政策制定者在利率政策上的分歧，这在最近几十年中很少见。内部辩论可能会使未来的货币政策决策变得复杂。

title: Delta launches 'basic business' fares without lounge access, seat selection
summary: Delta is introducing stripped-down premium cabin options eliminating lounge access and seat selection to compete on price while maintaining premium revenue. The move reflects airlines' strategy to capture budget-conscious business travelers.
content: Delta is launching basic business and other stripped-down premium classes that come with fewer perks.

zh.title: 达美航空推出不提供休息室访问和座位选择的'基础商务'票价
zh.summary: 达美航空推出精简版高级客舱选项，取消了休息室访问和座位选择，以在保持高级收入的同时在价格上竞争。这一举措反映了航空公司捕获对价格敏感的商务旅客的策略。

title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
summary: Trump criticized Spain for insufficient NATO contributions during a defense summit in Turkey, demanding trade cuts. The remarks underscore ongoing tensions over NATO burden-sharing and Trump's transactional approach to alliances.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

zh.title: 特朗普：不想与西班牙有任何关系，要求切断所有贸易
zh.summary: 特朗普在土耳其国防峰会上批评西班牙的北约贡献不足，要求削减贸易。此言论凸显了北约分担成本的持续紧张局势和特朗普对联盟的交易性态度。

title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
summary: China warned that specific versions of Claude Code contain back-door vulnerabilities that could expose sensitive data to remote servers. The allegation raises security concerns amid ongoing U.S.-China tech competition.
content: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

zh.title: 中国警告Anthropic的Claude Code存在AI安全风险
zh.summary: 中国警告称Claude Code的某些版本存在后门漏洞，可能泄露敏感数据到远程服务器。这一指控在美中科技竞争加剧的背景下引发了对安全的担忧。

title: SambaNova hits $11 billion valuation as investors back Nvidia chip challengers
summary: AI chip startup SambaNova reached an $11 billion valuation in a financing round led by General Atlantic, as companies seek alternatives to Nvidia's dominance in AI semiconductors.
content: SambaNova is valued at $11 billion after fresh financing led by General Atlantic, as AI chip startups look to challenge Nvidia.

zh.title: SambaNova估值达110亿美元，投资者支持英伟达芯片竞争对手
zh.summary: AI芯片初创公司SambaNova在由General Atlantic领投的融资中估值达到110亿美元，因为企业寻求英伟达在AI半导体领域垄断地位的替代方案。

title: Denmark PM vows to defend Greenland after Trump revives push for U.S. control
summary: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen rejected Trump's renewed push for U.S. control of Greenland, reaffirming Denmark's sovereignty over the territory amid diplomatic tensions.
content: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen delivered a rebuke to President Donald Trump's latest push for U.S. control of Greenland.

zh.title: 丹麦首相誓言保卫格陵兰，特朗普重新推动美国控制
zh.summary: 丹麦首相梅特·弗雷德里克森拒绝了特朗普关于美国控制格陵兰的新推动，在外交紧张局势中重申了丹麦对该领土的主权。

title: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
summary: Australia's largest telecommunications company suffered a major outage affecting trains and emergency services, with servers at Sydney and Melbourne data centers identified as the culprit though the root cause remains unknown.
content: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.

zh.title: 澳大利亚最大电信公司大规模宕机后，列车和紧急电话受到影响
zh.summary: 澳大利亚最大的电信公司遭遇大规模宕机，影响了列车和紧急服务，悉尼和墨尔本数据中心的服务器被确定为罪魁祸首，但根本原因仍不清楚。

title: 'Don't fool with us': NATO allies put on a united front as they prepare to meet Trump
summary: NATO members are presenting a united front ahead of their meeting with President Trump, with NATO chief Mark Rutte announcing the alliance's transition into a "NATO 3.0" era.
content: NATO chief Mark Rutte said Wednesday that the alliance was entering its "NATO 3.0" era.

zh.title: "别惹我们"：北约盟国在准备与特朗普会面时团结一致
zh.summary: 北约成员国在与特朗普总统会面前展现团结阵线，北约秘书长马克·吕特宣布联盟进入"北约3.0"时代。

title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions targets IPO in South Korea next year, CEO tells CNBC
summary: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions plans to go public on South Korea's KOSPI exchange next year, according to CEO Sunghyun Park, as the company seeks to compete in the chip market.
content: Sunghyun Park, CEO of Rebellions, told CNBC that the company is leaning toward a listing on the KOSPI over the KOSDAQ.

zh.title: 三星支持的AI芯片公司Rebellions计划明年在韩国IPO，CEO告诉CNBC
zh.summary: 三星支持的AI芯片公司Rebellions计划明年在韩国KOSPI交易所上市，CEO Sunghyun Park表示，该公司正寻求在芯片市场上竞争。

title: Virgin Media fined £28m for preventing customers from cancelling contracts
summary: Virgin Media was fined £28 million for mishandling customer cancellation requests over nearly three years, with regulators finding millions of phone calls were improperly processed.
content: Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly a three-year period, the regulator says.

zh.title: Virgin Media因阻止客户取消合同被罚2800万英镑
zh.summary: Virgin Media因近三年来处理不当客户取消请求被罚2800万英镑，监管部门发现数百万通电话处理不当。

title: Oil jumps as U.S. 'powerful strikes' against Iran risk stoke Mideast tensions
summary: Oil prices jumped following U.S. strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, intensifying Middle East regional tensions.
content: Oil prices rose on Wednesday after the U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗"强有力打击"可能加剧中东局势，油价随之上涨
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗进行打击以报复对霍尔木兹海峡商业船只的攻击后，油价上涨，加剧了中东地区紧张局势。

title: Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
summary: Australian dock workers are calling for a 28-hour work week as unions warn that automation and AI testing across ports put workers at risk of job displacement.
content: A union says workers are "in the crosshairs" of automation as AI is being tested across ports.

zh.title: 澳大利亚码头工人在AI谈判中呼吁每周28小时工作制
zh.summary: 澳大利亚码头工人要求每周工作28小时，工会警告称港口的自动化和AI测试可能使工人面临失业风险。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Dispatch from NATO, U.S. strikes Iran and Le Pen is back
summary: This news roundup covers three major geopolitical developments: escalating U.S.-NATO tensions at a defense summit, fresh strikes on Iran threatening Middle East stability, and Marine Le Pen's return to French politics.
content: Tensions between the U.S. and its allies heat up at the NATO Summit, while a fresh wave of stikes threatens the ceasefire in Iran.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：北约动向、美国打击伊朗和勒庞回归
zh.summary: 本新闻综述涵盖三项重大地缘政治发展：防务峰会上升级的美国-北约紧张局势、对伊朗的新一轮打击威胁中东稳定，以及玛丽娜·勒庞回归法国政治。

title: Apple begins testing CXMT chips for devices sold in China, FT says
summary: Apple has begun testing domestically-made CXMT chips for devices sold in the Chinese market, according to Financial Times reporting, as the company develops alternatives amid trade tensions.

zh.title: 苹果开始测试用于中国市场的CXMT芯片
zh.summary: 据英国《金融时报》报道，苹果公司已开始测试国内生产的CXMT芯片用于中国市场设备，在贸易紧张局势下开发替代方案。

title: Airbnb data identifies illegal social home sublets
summary: Airbnb's data analysis identified nearly 6,000 social homes illegally listed on short-term rental platforms, highlighting concerns about housing availability and regulatory compliance.
content: Nearly 6,000 social homes are thought to be illegally listed on short-term rental platforms.

zh.title: Airbnb数据识别非法社交住宅转租
zh.summary: Airbnb的数据分析发现近6000套社交住宅被非法列在短期租赁平台上，突出了对住房供应和监管合规性的担忧。

title: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
summary: A House Committee investigation is examining the growing adoption of Chinese-made AI models by U.S. companies, focusing on potential security risks and competitive implications.
content: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.

zh.title: 议员调查中国AI模型在美国公司中的使用增加
zh.summary: 众议院委员会正在调查美国公司对中国人工智能模型日益增长的采用，重点关注潜在的安全风险和竞争影响。

title: Chinese autonomous-driving firm Momenta rises 3% in Hong Kong stock debut
summary: Chinese autonomous-driving firm Momenta made its Hong Kong stock exchange debut on Wednesday, with shares rising 3%. The listing marks a significant milestone for the Chinese autonomous vehicle sector amid growing global competition in self-driving technology.
content: Chinese autonomous driving firm Momenta debuted on the Hong Kong stock exchange on Wednesday, rising 3%.

zh.title: 中国自动驾驶公司Momenta在香港股市首秀上涨3%
zh.summary: 中国自动驾驶公司Momenta于周三在香港交易所首次上市，股价上涨3%。此次上市标志着中国自动驾驶汽车行业在全球自动驾驶技术竞争加剧的背景下取得了重大里程碑。

title: China's rare missile test will push wary Asia-Pacific countries to close ranks, analysts say
summary: China conducted a rare ballistic missile test into the Pacific Ocean, prompting regional analysts to predict closer defense coordination among Asia-Pacific nations. The test signals growing military tensions and is expected to accelerate defense partnerships among wary regional powers.
content: China's rare launch of a ballistic missile launch into the Pacific will push regional powers to deepen their defense ties.

zh.title: 分析人士表示中国罕见的导弹试验将促使谨慎的亚太地区国家加强团结
zh.summary: 中国进行了一次罕见的弹道导弹试验，向太平洋发射，促使区域分析人士预测亚太地区国家之间的防务协调将更加密切。这次试验表明军事紧张局势加剧，预计将加速谨慎的地区大国之间的防务伙伴关系。

title: Plot twist: Gen Z is buying houses after all. Here’s how they’re doing it.
summary: Despite elevated housing costs, younger generations are finding ways to enter the property market. The article explores the strategies and financial approaches Gen Z homebuyers are using to overcome affordability challenges.
content: Despite soaring housing costs, younger buyers are finding a way in.

zh.title: 剧情反转：Z世代毕竟在购买房产。他们是这样做的。
zh.summary: 尽管房产成本高企，年轻一代正在寻找进入房产市场的途径。该文章探讨了Z世代购房者用来克服可负担性挑战的策略和财务方法。

title: Hundreds of jobs at risk as John Lewis plans to cut some services
summary: British retail giant John Lewis is planning to cut some services with potential job losses expected in autumn, pending approval of redundancy plans. The company has not finalized the decisions but has indicated the cuts are likely to proceed.
content: No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plans are approved.

zh.title: 数百个工作岗位面临风险，约翰·路易斯计划裁减部分服务
zh.summary: 英国零售巨头约翰·路易斯计划裁减部分服务，预期秋季会出现潜在的裁员，这取决于冗余计划的批准。该公司尚未最终确定决定，但已表示这些裁减可能会继续进行。

title: Rivian’s stock sale triggers worst rout for the shares in nearly two years
summary: Rivian's stock plummeted 18%, marking its worst performance in nearly two years following a secondary stock offering. Wall Street's concerns about the EV maker's cash position and financial sustainability drove the sharp decline.
content: Rivian’s stock falls 18% as Wall Street frets about the EV maker’s cash troubles.

zh.title: Rivian股票发行引发近两年来最大跌幅
zh.summary: Rivian股票暴跌18%，创近两年来最差表现，此前公司进行了二次股票发行。华尔街对这家电动汽车制造商的现金状况和财务可持续性的担忧推动了股价的急剧下跌。
